tech_news.title: Nintendo Cuts Switch 2 Output by Over 30% on Weak US Sales - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Nintendo Co. is cutting back the production of Switch 2 after demand for the $450 gaming console trailed the company’s expectations during the year-end holiday season, particularly in the US.

tech_news.title: Android Auto is breaking for Pixel and Samsung users, and no one knows why - Android Authority
tech_news.description: Android Auto is widely failing to connect or stay connected, especially on Pixel and Samsung phones. Wired connections appear most affected.

tech_news.title: 5 extreme and easy ways to clean your YouTube feed - Axios
tech_news.description: YouTube is packed with engagement bait and AI videos

tech_news.title: 35 Products I Bet You Haven’t Seen Yet, But I Also Bet You’ll *Love* - BuzzFeed
tech_news.description: Nobody panic, but Summer Fridays just released a caramel-vanilla perfume.

tech_news.title: Marathon's Cryo Archive Locks Out a Lot of Players, But Bungie Is Listening to Feedback - Push Square
Microsoft hires former Ai2 CEO Ali Farhadi and key researchers for Suleyman’s AI team - GeekWire
tech_news.description: Microsoft is hiring former Ai2 CEO Ali Farhadi, along with Hanna Hajishirzi and Ranjay Krishna from the Allen Institute for AI to join Mustafa Suleyman's Superintelligence team, GeekWire has learned. Former Ai2 COO Sophie Lebrecht is also making the move.

tech_news.title: That Air-Cooled Porsche Engine Isn't Just Cooled By Air, You Know - Jalopnik
tech_news.description: Air alone couldn't cool the Porsche 911. A variety of oil-cooling supplementary devices worked over the years to keep those engines running.

tech_news.title: Anthropic's Claude Can Now Control Your Computer - CNET
tech_news.description: The developer is boosting Claude's agentic capabilities in an apparent effort to compete with platforms like OpenClaw.

tech_news.title: Microsoft Aims to Supercharge Windows Performance and Cut RAM Waste in 2026 - PCMag
tech_news.description: Perhaps this would help return some of the goodwill it lost in 2025.
